sys_ui_page.html:
gs.getUserDisplayName()
Download Monthly Activities Excel

Hi, ${jvar_user_name}! Click the download button to get the monthly activities template

📋 Instructions

• Excel will be prefilled with all activities and dynamic month columns
• Editable columns: Month cells within each activity's date range (highlighted in yellow)
• Read-only columns are locked for data integrity
• Important: Sum of all month values for each activity must equal the Scope value
• Fill in the progress data and upload back to the system
(function() { var scopeGR = new GlideRecord('x_adga_project_p_0_scope'); if (scopeGR.get("${sysparm_rec_sys_id}")) { return JSON.stringify({ planned_start_date: scopeGR.getValue('planned_start_date'), planned_end_date: scopeGR.getValue('planned_end_date') }); } return JSON.stringify({}); })(); (function() { var activities = []; var actGR = new GlideRecord('x_adga_project_p_0_activities'); actGR.addQuery('scope_ref', "${sysparm_rec_sys_id}"); actGR.addQuery('u_applicable', "yes"); actGR.orderBy('order'); actGR.query(); while (actGR.next()) { var activityData = { sys_id: actGR.getValue('sys_id'), number: actGR.getValue('number'), name: actGR.activity_name.getDisplayValue(), type: actGR.activity_name.type.getDisplayValue(), strata: actGR.activity_name.strata.getDisplayValue(), unit: actGR.activity_name.unit.getDisplayValue(), scope: actGR.getValue('scope'), scope_number: actGR.scope_ref.getDisplayValue(), scope_type: actGR.scope_ref.scope_type.getDisplayValue(), primavera: actGR.getValue('primavera_activity_no'), start_date: actGR.getValue('planned_start_date'), end_date: actGR.getValue('planned_end_date'), monthly_data: {} }; // Get monthly activities for this activity var monthlyGR = new GlideRecord('x_adga_project_p_0_monthly_activities'); monthlyGR.addQuery('parent', actGR.getValue('sys_id')); monthlyGR.query(); while (monthlyGR.next()) { var monthKey = monthlyGR.getValue('u_month') + '-' + monthlyGR.getValue('u_year'); activityData.monthly_data[monthKey] = { sys_id: monthlyGR.getValue('sys_id'), progress: monthlyGR.getValue('current_months_scope') || '' }; } activities.push(activityData); } return JSON.stringify(activities); })();
sys_ui_page.name: download_monthly_scope_excel_template

sys_ui_page.html:
gs.getUserDisplayName()
Download Activities Excel

Hi,${jvar_user_name}!. Click on the download button to get the prefilled excel template

Instructions

• Excel template will be prefilled with all the relevant activities

• You won't be able to edit read-only columns

• Editable columns: Scope, Activity Applicable, Primavera Activity No, Planned Start Date, Planned End Date

(function() { var activities = []; var gr = new GlideRecord('x_adga_project_p_0_activities'); gr.addQuery('scope_ref', "${sysparm_rec_sys_id}"); gr.orderBy('order'); gr.query(); while (gr.next()) { activities.push({ number: gr.getValue('number'), name: gr.getDisplayValue('activity_name'), type: gr.activity_name.type.getDisplayValue(), strata: gr.activity_name.strata.getDisplayValue(), scopeType: gr.getDisplayValue('pipe_size'), scope: gr.getDisplayValue('scope'), applicable: gr.getDisplayValue('u_applicable'), primavera: gr.getValue('primavera_activity_no'), start: gr.getDisplayValue('planned_start_date'), end: gr.getDisplayValue('planned_end_date') }); } return JSON.stringify(activities); })();
sys_ui_page.name: download_scope_excel_template
